dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6881 IH: Welfare Abuse and Laundering Zillions Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Miller-Meeks introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committees on Education and Workforce, Ways and Means, and Natural Resources, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned

form.official-title: To direct the Inspector General of the Department of Health and Human Services to investigate certain payment increases under HHS programs.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Welfare Abuse and Laundering Zillions Act or the WALZ Act.

section.header: Requiring investigations of certain payment increases under HHS programs
section.text: In the case that, with respect to any 6-month period, the total amount paid to providers of services and suppliers under a program administered by the Secretary of Health and Human Services increases by 10 percent or more as compared to the prior 6-month period, the Inspector General of the Department of Health and Human Services shall open an investigation into such program.
